objective: Run a controlled five-epoch remote A40 baseline with isolated outputs, identify the best checkpoint, and measure whether a longer training horizon improves on C_REMOTE_A40_002.

commands.train: ssh -p 22141 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@194.68.245.210 'cd /workspace/NaturalLanguageUnderstandingCourseWork && ln -sf official_coursework/trial_data/ED_trial.csv test.csv && rm -rf experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_003 outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep && mkdir -p experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_003 && export SOLUTION_C_EPOCHS=5 && export SOLUTION_C_OUT_DIR=./outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep && export SOLUTION_C_SAVE_DIR=./outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep/best_model && source .venv/bin/activate && jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute solution_c_baseline_development.ipynb --output executed_solution_c_baseline.ipynb --output-dir experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_003 --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=0 2>&1 | tee experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_003/stdout.log'

notes: Controlled five-epoch remote A40 run completed. The best checkpoint was epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380, which improved over C_REMOTE_A40_002 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC. Epoch 5 regressed, so the current optimization signal is to keep the longer run but select the epoch-4 checkpoint rather than the final epoch.
